meta.disclaimer: This text is informational and may change. For legal advice, consult a professional. Company details (tax ID, address) will be completed for production.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: AlmaPet ID protects personal data of owners, clinic staff, and people who report a found pet. This policy explains what we collect, why, and how you can exercise your rights.

sections.heading: 1. Controller
paragraphs: The controller is AlmaPet ID (“AlmaPet”), operator of the animal identity network on this site.
Privacy requests: privacidad@almapetid.com (provisional contact).

sections.heading: 2. Data we process
paragraphs: Owners: name, ID document, email, phone, district-level location, pet and microchip data.
Clinics: business name, tax ID, contact, location, and related implant registrations.
Public found reports: reporter name, phone or email, message, and approximate area — only to notify the owner.
Technical data: IP, device, necessary cookies, and push subscription if enabled.

sections.heading: 3. Purposes
paragraphs: Provide registration, certificate, lost declaration, and reunion flows.
Collect the registry fee via payment gateways or manual confirmation.
Send operational alerts (email, push, or other channels you enable).
Meet legal duties and handle complaints.

sections.heading: 4. Legal basis and retention
paragraphs: We process data to perform the service contract, for legitimate interests in network integrity, and with consent when required (e.g. non-essential cookies).
We keep data while the account or registration is active and for any additional period required by law or claims defense.

sections.heading: 5. Public profile and lost pets
paragraphs: The public profile shows limited pet information (name, species, photo, status). It does not publish national ID or exact home address.
When status is “lost”, approximate district/area and tutor-chosen public notes may appear.

sections.heading: 6. Processors and transfers
paragraphs: We may use hosting, email, payments (e.g. Culqi), and analytics under processor agreements. We do not sell personal data.
International transfers, if any, will use appropriate safeguards.

sections.heading: 7. Your rights
paragraphs: You may request access, rectification, erasure, objection, and portability under applicable Peruvian law (Law 29733).
You may also file a complaint with the National Data Protection Authority.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.intro: By using AlmaPet ID you accept these terms. If you disagree, do not use the service.

sections.heading: 1. The service
paragraphs: AlmaPet ID is an animal identity network: microchip registration, digital certificate, status (active/lost), and mediated reunion.
An ISO microchip identifies the animal; AlmaPet is not GPS and does not guarantee physical location.

sections.heading: 2. Accounts and accuracy
paragraphs: You must provide accurate information and keep your credentials confidential.
Affiliated clinics must be authorized to register their clients’ animals.

sections.heading: 3. Registration and payments
paragraphs: The registry fee is shown at checkout. It may be charged via gateway or included in a clinic pack.
A microchip may only have one active (or lost) registration on the network at a time.

sections.heading: 4. Acceptable use
paragraphs: Do not use the service for harassment, fraud, fake found reports, or exposing third-party data without a legal basis.
We may suspend accounts for abuse, payment fraud, or risks to network integrity.

sections.heading: 5. Liability
paragraphs: AlmaPet facilitates identity and mediated contact; it is not liable for third-party conduct or carrier/payment delays.
To the extent permitted by law, liability is limited to fees paid to AlmaPet in the prior 12 months.

sections.heading: 6. Governing law
paragraphs: These terms are governed by the laws of Peru. Courts of Lima shall have jurisdiction unless mandatory law provides otherwise.

returns.title: Returns & refunds
returns.intro: Applies to the AlmaPet ID digital registry fee. Physical chips and implant procedures are billed by the clinic under their own policy.

sections.heading: 1. Nature of the service
paragraphs: The AlmaPet ID fee is for a digital registry/identity service. Once the registration is activated and the certificate/code issued, the service is considered delivered.

sections.heading: 2. Refunds
paragraphs: If payment succeeded but activation failed due to AlmaPet, we will refund the fee or retry activation.
No fee refund after the registration is active or lost, except for proven duplicate charges.

sections.heading: 3. How to request
paragraphs: Email soporte@almapetid.com with account email, microchip or public code, and payment proof.
We aim to respond within 5–10 business days.

sections.heading: 4. Physical chip & implant
paragraphs: Warranty or returns for the physical microchip or clinical procedure must be handled with the veterinary clinic.

cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.intro: We use cookies and similar technologies to run the site and, where required, with your permission to improve the experience.

sections.heading: 1. What they are
paragraphs: Cookies are small files stored by your browser. We also use local storage (e.g. language) and, if you enable the PWA, a push subscription.

sections.heading: 2. Types we use
paragraphs: Necessary: session, CSRF security, language and theme preference.
Functional: PWA install preference or UI settings.
Analytics (if enabled): aggregated usage. You will be able to reject them when the consent banner is live.

sections.heading: 3. Managing cookies
paragraphs: You can delete or block cookies in your browser settings. Blocking necessary cookies may break parts of the site.

complaints.title: Complaints book
complaints.intro: Under Peruvian consumer protection rules, we provide this virtual Complaints Book for claims or complaints about the AlmaPet ID service.

sections.heading: 1. Provider identification
paragraphs: Trade name: AlmaPet ID.
Address, tax ID and legal representative will be published when formal commercial operations begin in Peru.
Contact: reclamaciones@almapetid.com

sections.heading: 2. Claim vs complaint
paragraphs: Claim (reclamación): disagreement directly related to the product or service (payment, registration, certificate, alerts).
Complaint (queja): dissatisfaction not directly related to the product, or about the attention received.

sections.heading: 3. Procedure
paragraphs: Complete the form with your details, facts, and request. Keep a copy or screenshot.
AlmaPet will respond within the legally applicable term (orientative reference: up to 15 business days).
If you disagree with the response, you may go to INDECOPI or other applicable channels.

form.title: File a complaints sheet
form.hint: Fields marked * are required. Submission is acknowledged on screen for now; email ticket correlatives will ship in production.
form.name: Full name *
form.success: We recorded your submission on screen. Keep a screenshot. Soon this will generate an email correlative.
